task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new Business Unit and Departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Sentrifugo Organization/Business Units page showing 'Asia-Pacific Operations' and the Departments page showing 'APAC Product Engineering' and 'APAC Client Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new regional leadership job titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Sentrifugo Job Titles page showing 'Regional Engineering Director' and 'Client Solutions Architect' added to the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the onboarding of the three new employees with correct IDs and roles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Employees list or profile pages showing Wei Chen (ID 025 or EMP025), Priya Sharma (ID 026 or EMP026), and Kenji Tanaka (ID 027 or EMP027) with their respective departments and titles.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the region-specific leave type and holiday calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing 'Childcare Leave' (6 days) in the Leave Types section, and 'Singapore Office Holidays 2026' in the Holiday Groups section with the 3 specified holidays (New Year's Day, Chinese New Year Day 1, National Day).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new client and project in the Time module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Time module showing the Client 'APAC Regional Program' and the Project 'Singapore Office Launch' linked to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of project tasks and employee allocations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the tasks 'Office Infrastructure Setup' and 'Client Onboarding Pipeline' under the Singapore project, and an allocation screen showing Wei Chen and Priya Sharma assigned to the project.

task_completion.description: Verify the company-wide announcement about the expansion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Announcements or Dashboard page displaying an announcement titled 'APAC Regional Expansion — Singapore Office Opening' (or starting with 'APAC Regional Expansion').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen navigating the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, filling out forms, and clicking save/submit, rather than executing SQL insert commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened and read the provided playbook file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for early screenshots showing the agent opening `~/Desktop/apac_expansion_playbook.txt` in a text editor or terminal to read the configuration requirements.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not delete or modify pre-existing organizational data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Existing employees (e.g., EMP001-EMP020) and existing departments/BUs should still be visible in the list views and not altered or deleted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure Sentrifugo HRMS for a new APAC office. Expected entities: 1. BU: 'Asia-Pacific Operations'. 2. Departments: 'APAC Product Engineering', 'APAC Client Solutions'. 3. Job Titles: 'Regional Engineering Director', 'Client Solutions Architect'. 4. Employees: Wei Chen (ID 025), Priya Sharma (ID 026), Kenji Tanaka (ID 027). 5. Leave Type: 'Childcare Leave' (6 days). 6. Holiday Group: 'Singapore Office Holidays 2026' with New Year's Day (2026-01-01), Chinese New Year Day 1 (2026-02-17), National Day (2026-08-09). 7. Time Module: Client 'APAC Regional Program', Project 'Singapore Office Launch', Tasks 'Office Infrastructure Setup' and 'Client Onboarding Pipeline', allocated to EMP025 and EMP026. 8. Announcement: 'APAC Regional Expansion'. Note: Leave types page is at /employeeleavetypes.
